title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and several injuries. The incident occurred Monday morning.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on communities in North Carolina.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Showcases advancements and training opportunities in polymer science and extrusion technology in the Charlotte area.

title: Suspect Arrested in Stabbing of Pregnant Woman in Charlotte
summary: Police have apprehended a woman with an extensive criminal background for stabbing a pregnant woman in a random attack at a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about violent crime and the safety of pregnant women in public spaces.

title: Repeat Offender Accused of Stabbing Pregnant Woman at Harris Teeter
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte Harris Teeter parking lot. She has nine prior convictions.
charlotte_impact: Focuses on repeat offenders and the potential failures of the justice system to prevent violent crime.

title: Averitt to Build Regional Campus in West Charlotte
summary: Supply chain company Averitt is set to construct a new regional campus in west Charlotte, replacing its current location on Westinghouse Boulevard.
charlotte_impact: Indicates economic growth and investment in the Charlotte region's logistics and supply chain sector.

title: Charlotte-Area Schools Cancel Class for Teacher Rally in Raleigh
summary: Several Charlotte-area schools are canceling classes as educators rally in Raleigh to advocate for increased public school funding.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing debate and activism surrounding public education funding in North Carolina.

title: Death Investigation Underway in Uptown Charlotte
summary: Police are investigating a death reported on North College Street near East 8th Street in Uptown Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a death investigation, contributing to awareness of public safety issues in the uptown area.

title: Woman Killed in Lancaster County Hit-and-Run
summary: A woman was killed in a hit-and-run in Lancaster County. The driver fled the scene and remains unidentified.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the dangers of hit-and-run incidents and the importance of road safety.

title: Rain and Strong Storms Forecasted for Wednesday
summary: The weather forecast predicts rain Wednesday morning, with the potential for strong-to-severe storms in the afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Provides information about potential weather hazards and encourages preparedness.

title: Cleveland County Detention Officer Arrested for Sexual Activity
summary: A Cleveland County detention officer, David Morrow, was arrested for sexual activity. Details about the alleged victim were not disclosed.
charlotte_impact: Addresses potential abuse of power and ethical violations within law enforcement.

title: Nonprofit Honors Fallen Officer Joshua Eyer with Martial Arts Training
summary: Jedi Blue, a new nonprofit, will offer free martial arts training to first responders, veterans, military members, and their children in honor of CMPD Officer Joshua Eyer.
charlotte_impact: Highlights community support for first responders and honors the memory of a fallen officer.

title: Charlotte City Council Seeks Pause on I-77 Toll Lane Project
summary: The Charlotte City Council will seek a pause on 'irreversible actions' in the I-77 toll lane project for reevaluation and design analysis.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing debates and concerns about infrastructure development and toll roads in the region.

title: DA Calls for Changes to NC Strangulation Law After Acquittals
summary: Charlotte's DA is urging lawmakers to revise the assault by strangulation law after two men were acquitted despite violent attacks.
charlotte_impact: Addresses potential loopholes or weaknesses in the legal system regarding violent assault cases.

title: Search Warrants Reveal Alleged Scheme Targeting Greg Biffle's Bank Accounts
summary: Search warrants reveal an alleged scheme targeting Greg Biffle's bank accounts after a plane crash, including fraudulent financial activity.
charlotte_impact: Highlights financial crimes and potential vulnerabilities in personal financial security.

title: Duke Energy Rate Hike Public Hearing in Mecklenburg County
summary: A public hearing regarding a Duke Energy rate hike will be held at the Mecklenburg County Courthouse, with a rally organized by the Sierra Club.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about energy costs and environmental advocacy in the community.
